name: Gryphon Capital Income Trust
analysis: GCI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.0612. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
